action.reasoning: Observation: v6 eval failed because predict.py didn't handle 'dinov2_partial' model type. Need to fix predict.py to support all model types including v6. Analysis: Best test=0.6036 with frozen dual backbone. v6 (DINOv2 partial unfreeze + CORAL) got 0.8408 val bal_acc. Decision: Fix predict.py to handle v6, submit eval. Also consider that partial unfreezing may overfit - if v6 doesn't improve, focus on ensemble of frozen models with better calibration.
action.command: python -c "import torch; ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/best_v6.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('model_type:', ckpt.get('model_type')); print('unfreeze_last_n:', ckpt.get('unfreeze_last_n')); print('val_bal_acc:', ckpt.get('val_bal_acc'))"
